title: Happy New Year!
excerpt: Back in the studio today after an eventful last couple of weeks! Hope your holidays were wonderful. In case you missed the big news on Instagram , I thought I would include it here as well. And over 10,000 likes…
body:
Back in the studio today after an eventful last couple of weeks! Hope your holidays were wonderful. In case you missed the big news on Instagram, I thought I would include it here as well. And over 10,000 likes - whoa!!! I think I will work on a comprehensive blog post about it, so if you have any questions, let me know and maybe I can answer them! 

I've decided to start a new bullet journal (in Emerald) even though I failed miserably at keeping up in December. Do you think I should color this in or leave it as is?

PS - Tombow is having a 25% off everything sale through 1/5 using the code: TREATYOURSELF
